name: Immersion Corporation
description: Immersion Corporation is a leading provider of haptic feedback technology, which creates realistic tactile sensations for digital devices. Founded in 1993, the company designs, develops, and licenses haptic technologies that allow users to feel and interact with digital content in mobile devices, automotive interfaces, gaming consoles, medical equipment, and virtual reality systems. Immersion's extensive patent portfolio and software solutions enable device manufacturers to deliver more intuitive, engaging, and immersive user experiences across various consumer and industrial applications.
